zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前SOL价格围绕66.7窄幅震荡，短线维持均线附近整理结构，整体趋势略偏多但动能有限，上行持续性待确认短期关注量能变化为主区间。

MACD指标仍显示正向动能，短期多头延续但未放量，SMA20略压制价格，RSI缺失使判断依赖价格结构整体动能中性偏强震荡修复阶段。

上方阻力关注66.9及67.5区域，下方支撑在66.6与66.2附近，若跌破可能回踩区间下沿区间震荡为主短线关注突破方向信号确认。

操作建议以高抛低吸为主，未放量突破前不追高，可等待回踩均线附近分批布局止损设在66.2下方，盈利目标看67.5及更高延伸执行纪律。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 66.76, showing minimal volatility after a slight 24-hour gain of 0.17%. Price action remains compressed between 66.58 and 66.91, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The broader structure is sideways, with no clear directional breakout. The proximity to the 20-period SMA at 66.92 suggests the market is testing short-term resistance while maintaining a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias overall.

Indicator signals remain mixed, with MACD currently reading 0.2350, suggesting modest positive momentum but without a confirmed signal line due to incomplete data. This implies upward pressure is present but not strongly accelerating. In absence of RSI, price behavior and SMA interaction become more important. The market appears to be coiling, with momentum flattening and volatility contracting, often preceding a directional breakout or continued range-bound movement.

Key support is established near the session low at 66.58, with deeper structural support around 66.40 if selling pressure increases. On the upside, immediate resistance is clustered at 66.91 and reinforced by the 20-SMA at 66.92, forming a tight ceiling. A sustained break above 67.20 would be required to confirm bullish continuation, while failure to reclaim SMA may reinforce ongoing consolidation.

Trading conditions favor short-term range strategies due to compressed volatility and lack of directional confirmation. Buying near 66.60–66.65 may offer favorable risk-reward setups with tight stops below 66.40. On the upside, profit-taking zones sit near 66.90–67.20. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above resistance before entering longs, while breakdown below support may shift bias bearish in the near term market structure.
